strengths: Clean separation: pure validation functions (validateLogoFile, validateFileSize, generateLogoFilename) exported and independently testable
Thorough path traversal protection in tryDeleteOldUploadedLogo (prefix check, slash/dotdot check, resolved path check)
Lazy multer import pattern prevents side effects during pure function test collection
Comprehensive error handling: fileFilter rejections, LIMIT_FILE_SIZE, missing file, and general errors all mapped to correct HTTP status codes
Old logo cleanup is best-effort with silent error catch — correct behavior for ENOENT/permission edge cases
Absolute UPLOADS_DIR via fileURLToPath ensures correct path regardless of cwd
